Container.Name: ookla-speedtest-exporter
Container.Overview: Prometheus metrics exporter for Ookla Speedtest CLI. Runs a live speedtest on each scrape and exposes bandwidth, ping, latency, and packet loss metrics.
Container.Changes:
###2026-02-21 - Restored IQM latency metrics for download and upload - Updated icon
###2026-02-20 - Moved server/ISP labels off numeric metrics into speedtest_info - Add server_host, server_name, server_location to speedtest_info metric - Expand exposed metrics to cover full speedtest JSON output - Remove cached mode — on_demand only - Remove HEALTHCHECK to prevent spurious on_demand speedtest triggers - Optimize Dockerfile for image size and layer optimizations - Fix queued scrapes triggering multiple back-to-back speedtests - Improve logging consistency and detail - Initial release
